REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF DEFT CDI COROPORATION'S DEMURER TO PLTF'S COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CDI CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT C D I CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THE COMPLAINT IS UNTIMELY UNDER THE APPLICABLE CLAIMS STATUTE AND STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SUGGESTED ANY BASIS ON WHICH SHE COULD AMEND HER COMPLAINT TO CURE THESE BARS. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
